data.narrative:
Pano AI is a Series B climate and energy company currently valued at $500M post-money, having raised $89M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a peer universe of five same-stage, same-sector private companies (Commonwealth Fusion Systems, Sage Geosystems, Reverion, CarbonCapture Inc., and Cemvita Factory) alongside one public comparable, with peer valuations ranging from $120M to $5.0B.

Two methods anchor the triangulation. The stage-progression approach applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B-to-next-stage advancement to the $500M last post-money, yielding $950M. The peer-median method identifies a $310M median across the five same-sector, same-stage comparables, reflecting the wide dispersion in this sector ($120M floor, $5.0B ceiling). The median peer valuation is notably below the company's current $500M post-money, suggesting either outperformance relative to peers or prior-round optimism.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $264M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $630M. The current $500M+ valuation falls within this band, closer to the median than either extreme. Key uncertainties include the significant spread among peer valuations in the Climate & Energy sector, which complicates single-point estimates, and the degree to which Pano AI's metrics diverge from the peer cohort on revenue, growth trajectory, or technical defensibility.
